unfolding.problem: Variance 13.27 vs GUE 0.178 — overcorrection at large conductor
unfolding.small_conductor_better: N~10^1: var=0.345, much closer to GUE 0.178

nn_ratio.match: 2.5% — robust to unfolding errors (ratio cancels density)

rank_stratified.note: Variance INCREASES with rank. Higher rank = more spread zeros.

Cross-family zero repulsion experiment once unfolding is correct
